findings.description: The knowledge file contains 7 sections (s1–s7), but the automated pre-check detected 11 headings in the source file. The provided source ends at the `.. _pjconf_json:` anchor label without its content, strongly indicating the full source file continues with additional sections (e.g., pjconf_json detail, lessImport_less, generate-file, build-file, build-command). Those sections are not represented in the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends at `.. _pjconf_json:` (bare anchor label, no content follows in the provided excerpt). The 設定ファイル table references both `:ref:\`pjconf_json\`` and `:ref:\`lessImport_less\``, and the 詳細仕様 section lists `:ref:\`config-file\``, `:ref:\`generate-file\``, `:ref:\`build-file\``, `:ref:\`build-command\`` — none of these sub-sections have corresponding knowledge-file sections beyond s7.
